Off Calendar Jul-09-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: All parties and witnesses are sworn
Joshua Tan and You Wu are not present.

Soophie Lau, respondent tesifies on her own behalf.
Shawn Kosoy, appellant testifies on his own behalf.

The parties rest.

At the conclusion of the heearing, the matter is taken under submission.
